titleCandidates: Depression, cognition, cardiovascular burden, and bioinformatics boundary plan: a longitudinal aging cohort manuscript

researchQuestion: Among middle-aged and older adults, how is depression, cognitive decline, cardiovascular disease burden, and bioinformatics mechanisms in older adults related to longitudinal changes in aging-related outcomes after wave linkage and attrition assessment?
reportingGuidelinePath: STROBE/RECORD depending on linkage and reporting frame
methodsFramework: Data source, waves, and access status

tableFigureShell.label: Wave linkage, attrition, and missingness summary

readinessGate.minimumNextStage: S3 data execution and S7 integrity check before numeric manuscript claims

boundary: Use temporal association or trajectory language only unless a defensible causal design is added.
